lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨਾ ਕਥੀ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਤੋਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: kathanaa kathee na aavai tott |
lines.english: There is no shortage of those who preach and teach.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਿ ਕਥਿ ਕਥੀ ਕੋਟੀ ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: kath kath kathee kottee kott kott |
lines.english: Millions upon millions offer millions of sermons and stories.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਵੇਖੈ ਹਾਦਰਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko vekhai haadaraa hadoor |
lines.english: Some sing that He watches over us, face to face, ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਚਲਾਏ ਰਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee hukam chalaae raahu |
lines.english: The Commander, by His Command, leads us to walk on the Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਦਾ ਦੇ ਲੈਦੇ ਥਕਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dedaa de laide thak paeh |
lines.english: The Great Giver keeps on giving, while those who receive grow weary of receiving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਾ ਜੁਗੰਤਰਿ ਖਾਹੀ ਖਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jugaa jugantar khaahee khaeh |
lines.english: Throughout the ages, consumers consume.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਹਿ ਮੰਗਹਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aakheh mangeh dehi dehi daat kare daataar |
lines.english: People beg and pray, "Give to us, give to us", and the Great Giver gives His Gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak vigasai veparavaahu |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, He blossoms forth, Carefree and Untroubled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਇ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa saahib saach naae bhaakhiaa bhaau apaar |
lines.english: True is the Master, True is His Name-speak it with infinite love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੇਰਿ ਕਿ ਅਗੈ ਰਖੀਐ ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਸੈ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: fer ki agai rakheeai jit disai darabaar |
lines.english: So what offering can we place before Him, by which we might see the Darbaar of His Court?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹੌ ਕਿ ਬੋਲਣੁ ਬੋਲੀਐ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: muhau ki bolan boleeai jit sun dhare piaar |
lines.english: What words can we speak to evoke His Love?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵੇਲਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: amrit velaa sach naau vaddiaaee veechaar |
lines.english: In the Amrit Vaylaa, the ambrosial hours before dawn, chant the True Name, and contemplate His Glorious Greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੀ ਆਵੈ ਕਪੜਾ ਨਦਰੀ ਮੋਖੁ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karamee aavai kaparraa nadaree mokh duaar |
lines.english: By the karma of past actions, the robe of this physical body is obtained. By His Grace, the Gate of Liberation is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਵੈ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak evai jaaneeai sabh aape sachiaar |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, know this well: the True One Himself is All. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਪਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਕੀਤਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: thaapiaa na jaae keetaa na hoe |
lines.english: He cannot be established, He cannot be created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap niranjan soe |
lines.english: He Himself is Immaculate and Pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗਾਵੀਐ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak gaaveeai gunee nidhaan |
lines.english: O Nanak, sing of the Lord, the Treasure of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin seviaa tin paaeaa maan |
lines.english: Those who serve Him are honored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੀਐ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਮਨਿ ਰਖੀਐ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gaaveeai suneeai man rakheeai bhaau |
lines.english: Sing, and listen, and let your mind be filled with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਦੰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵੇਦੰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naadan guramukh vedan guramukh rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: The Guru's Word is the Sound-current of the Naad; the Guru's Word is the Wisdom of the Vedas; the Guru's Word is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਘਰਿ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh parahar sukh ghar lai jaae |
lines.english: Your pain shall be sent far away, and peace shall come to your home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹਉ ਜਾਣਾ ਆਖਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: je hau jaanaa aakhaa naahee kahanaa kathan na jaaee |
lines.english: Even knowing God, I cannot describe Him; He cannot be described in words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਈਸਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਰਖੁ ਬਰਮਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਰਬਤੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur eesar gur gorakh baramaa gur paarabatee maaee |
lines.english: The Guru is Shiva, the Guru is Vishnu and Brahma; the Guru is Paarvati and Lakhshmi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਾ ਇਕ ਦੇਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guraa ik dehi bujhaaee |
lines.english: The Guru has given me this one understanding:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਮੈ ਵਿਸਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea kaa ik daataa so mai visar na jaaee |5|
lines.english: there is only the One, the Giver of all souls. May I never forget Him! ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੀ ਸਿਰਠਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਵੇਖਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਲਈ ॥
lines.translit: jetee siratth upaaee vekhaa vin karamaa ki milai lee |
lines.english: I gaze upon all the created beings: without the karma of good actions, what are they given to receive?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਕਿ ਨਾਇ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: teerath naavaa je tis bhaavaa vin bhaane ki naae karee |
lines.english: If I am pleasing to Him, then that is my pilgrimage and cleansing bath. Without pleasing Him, what good are ritual cleansings?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਾ ਇਕ ਦੇਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guraa ik dehi bujhaaee |
lines.english: The Guru has given me this one understanding:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਤਨ ਜਵਾਹਰ ਮਾਣਿਕ ਜੇ ਇਕ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਸੁਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: mat vich ratan javaahar maanik je ik gur kee sikh sunee |
lines.english: Within the mind are gems, jewels and rubies, if you listen to the Guru's Teachings, even once.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਮੈ ਵਿਸਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea kaa ik daataa so mai visar na jaaee |6|
lines.english: there is only the One, the Giver of all souls. May I never forget Him! ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਆਰਜਾ ਹੋਰ ਦਸੂਣੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: je jug chaare aarajaa hor dasoonee hoe |
lines.english: Even if you could live throughout the four ages, or even ten times more,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵਾ ਖੰਡਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਨਾਲਿ ਚਲੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: navaa khanddaa vich jaaneeai naal chalai sabh koe |
lines.english: and even if you were known throughout the nine continents and followed by all,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਗਾ ਨਾਉ ਰਖਾਇ ਕੈ ਜਸੁ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਜਗਿ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: changaa naau rakhaae kai jas keerat jag lee |
lines.english: with a good name and reputation, with praise and fame throughout the world-

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਗੁਣਿ ਗੁਣੁ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਣਵੰਤਿਆ ਗੁਣੁ ਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak niragun gun kare gunavantiaa gun de |
lines.english: O Nanak, God blesses the unworthy with virtue, and bestows virtue on the virtuous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਟਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੀਟੁ ਕਰਿ ਦੋਸੀ ਦੋਸੁ ਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: keettaa andar keett kar dosee dos dhare |
lines.english: Among worms, you would be considered a lowly worm, and even contemptible sinners would hold you in contempt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਤ ਵਾਤ ਨ ਪੁਛੈ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: je tis nadar na aavee ta vaat na puchhai ke |
lines.english: still, if the Lord does not bless you with His Glance of Grace, then who cares? What is the use?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਹਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਜਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਣੁ ਕੋਇ ਕਰੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tehaa koe na sujhee ji tis gun koe kare |7|
lines.english: No one can even imagine anyone who can bestow virtue upon Him. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸਿਧ ਪੀਰ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: suniai sidh peer sur naath |
lines.english: Listening-the Siddhas, the spiritual teachers, the heroic warriors, the yogic masters.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਦੀਪ ਲੋਅ ਪਾਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: suniai deep loa paataal |
lines.english: Listening-the oceans, the lands of the world and the nether regions of the underworld.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਧਰਤਿ ਧਵਲ ਆਕਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: suniai dharat dhaval aakaas |
lines.english: Listening-the earth, its support and the Akaashic ethers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਪੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: suniai pohi na sakai kaal |
lines.english: Listening-Death cannot even touch you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagataa sadaa vigaas |
lines.english: O Nanak, the devotees are forever in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਦੂਖ ਪਾਪ ਕਾ ਨਾਸੁ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: suniai dookh paap kaa naas |8|
lines.english: Listening-pain and sin are erased. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਈਸਰੁ ਬਰਮਾ ਇੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: suniai eesar baramaa ind |
lines.english: Listening-Shiva, Brahma and Indra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸਾਸਤ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਵੇਦ ॥
lines.translit: suniai saasat simrit ved |
lines.english: Listening-the Shaastras, the Simritees and the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਣ ਮੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: suniai mukh saalaahan mand |
lines.english: Listening-even foul-mouthed people praise Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਤਨਿ ਭੇਦ ॥
lines.translit: suniai jog jugat tan bhed |
lines.english: Listening-the technology of Yoga and the secrets of the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagataa sadaa vigaas |
lines.english: O Nanak, the devotees are forever in bliss.
